/** * AbstractDateTime provides the common behaviour for immutable datetime * classes. *

* This class should generally not be used directly by API users. The * {@link ReadableDateTime} interface should be used when different * kinds of date/time objects are to be referenced. * * @author Brian S O'Neill * @since 1.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * AbstractDateTime provides the common behaviour for datetime classes. *

* This class should generally not be used directly by API users. * The {@link ReadableDateTime} interface should be used when different * kinds of date/time objects are to be referenced. *

* AbstractDateTime subclasses may be mutable and not thread-safe. * * @author Brian S O'Neill * @author Stephen Colebourne * @since 1.0 */
